delayed-self-check.script:
stage_ms="$(date -u -d "$LIBCI_STAGE_STARTED_AT" +%s%3N)"
job_ms="$(date -u -d "$CI_JOB_STARTED_AT" +%s%3N)"
delay_ms="$((job_ms - stage_ms))"

{
  printf 'stage_started_at=%s\n' "$LIBCI_STAGE_STARTED_AT"
  printf 'job_started_at=%s\n' "$CI_JOB_STARTED_AT"
  printf 'delay_ms=%s\n' "$delay_ms"
} > reports/delayed-self-check.log

if [ "$delay_ms" -lt 5800 ]; then
  echo "[ERROR] delayed job started too early: ${delay_ms}ms"
  exit 1
fi
